title: Automations for Subitems Based on Pending Subtasks

posts.author: MMH (Maryam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, when creating automations that involve subitems, it is not possible to set dependencies on a subtask that has not yet been created. This limitation makes it challenging to fully leverage subitem automations for workflow planning and task management.

What are you trying to achieve

Enable automations where dependencies, triggers, or actions can be set for subitems that are planned but not yet created. This would allow for more dynamic and flexible project management, especially for complex workflows that rely on sequential subtasks.

Benefit:

  1. Streamlines workflow automation for projects with layered subitems.
  2. Reduces manual intervention to adjust dependencies once subtasks are created.
  3. Unlocks the full potential of subitem automations, improving efficiency and planning.
